LanguageData.FCP_Permit_BoS_Supply_Drop_Food.descript: Call for 钢铁兄弟会 food supplies.
LanguageData.FCP_Permit_BoS_Supply_Drop_Food.label: BoS 食品掉落
LanguageData.FCP_Permit_BoS_Supply_Drop_Tech_Resource: Call for 钢铁兄弟会 technical resources and components.
LanguageData.FCP_Permit_BoS_Supply_Drop_Uniforms.desc: Call for 钢铁兄弟会 standard uniforms.
LanguageData.FCP_Permit_BoS_Supply_Drop_Weapons.descr: Call for 钢铁兄弟会 standard issue weapons.
LanguageData.FCP_Permit_BoS_Supply_Drop_Weapons.label: BoS 武器掉落
LanguageData.FCP_Permit_Enclave_Power_Armor_Drop.desc: Call for 英克雷 power armor deployment.
LanguageData.FCP_Permit_Enclave_Supply_Drop.descripti: Call for an 英克雷 supply drop containing survival essentials.
LanguageData.FCP_Permit_Enclave_Supply_Drop.label: 英克雷 Supply Drop
LanguageData.FCP_Permit_Enclave_Technology_Drop.descr: Call for advanced technology and components from 英克雷 stores.
LanguageData.FCP_Permit_Enclave_Technology_Drop.label: 英克雷 Technology Drop
LanguageData.FCP_Permit_Enclave_Weapons_Drop.descript: Call for advanced 英克雷 weaponry including plasma weapons.
LanguageData.FCP_Permit_Enclave_Weapons_Drop.label: 英克雷 Weapons Drop
LanguageData.FCP_Permit_NCR_Army_Supply_Drop_Uniforms: 征集 NCR 陆军制服。
征集 NCR 陆军武器。
LanguageData.FCP_Permit_NCR_Ranger_Supply_Drop_Patrol: 征集 NCR 游骑兵制服。
LanguageData.FCP_Permit_NCR_Ranger_Supply_Drop_Unifor: 征集 NCR 游骑兵制服。
LanguageData.FCP_Permit_NCR_Ranger_Supply_Drop_Vetera: 召唤 NCR 游骑兵老兵盔甲。
NCR 游骑兵老兵装甲掉落
LanguageData.FCP_Permit_NCR_Ranger_Supply_Drop_Weapon: 征集 NCR 游骑兵武器。
LanguageData.FCP_Permit_NCR_Supply_Drop_Food.descript: 请求 NCR 食品供应。
LanguageData.FCP_Permit_NCR_Supply_Drop_Food.label: NCR 食品空投
LanguageData.FCP_Permit_USA_Supply_Drop_Food.label: US Food Drop
